A001 核销gmv verify_gmv 统计周期内，连锁业务总核销gmv SUM(金额字段) soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d SELECT SUM(exe_amount) 核销gmv

WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
AND is_valid = 1

A002 核销收入 verify_income 统计周期内，连锁业务总核销收入 SUM(金额字段) soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d SELECT SUM(exe_income) 核销收入

FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
AND is_valid = 1 ⚠ 原SQL使用verify_date_id统计人次，请确认是否等同于核销人次

A018 库存数 inventory_cnt 截止至今，总库存数量 soyoung_dw.dws_qy_sc_ware_stock_stats_all_d SELECT ware_name,

A019 相控微针升单率 micro_needle_upsell_rate 统计周期内，原单为相控微针且当日发生升单的核销人次/相控微针原单核销人次 分子指标 / 分母指标 soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d SELECT a.standard_name ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(b.verify_date_id IS NOT NULL,a.verify_date_id,NULL)) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.verify_date_id)升单率
FROM (
SELECT standard_name
,verify_date_id
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(current_date(),1)
and is_valid = 1
AND standard_name REGEXP '相控微针'
AND ord_up_type_name = '原单'
) a
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT
standard_name
,verify_date_id
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(current_date(),1)
AND ord_up_type_name = '升单'
AND is_valid = 1
) b
ON a.verify_date_id = b.verify_date_id
GROUP BY a.standard_name
;

sum(if(a.verify_date_id = b.verify_date_id,b.exe_income,0))/nullif(count(distinct if(b.verify_date_id is not null,a.verify_date_id,null)),0) 相控微针升单客单价

SELECT standard_name
,verify_date_id
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(current_date(),1)
and is_valid = 1
AND standard_name REGEXP '相控微针'
AND ord_up_type_name = '原单'
) a
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT
standard_name
,verify_date_id
,exe_income
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(current_date(),1)
AND ord_up_type_name = '升单'
AND is_valid = 1
) b
ON a.verify_date_id = b.verify_date_id
GROUP BY a.standard_name
;

D130 相控微针升单率 统计周期内，原单为相控微针且当日发生升单的核销人次/相控微针原单核销人次 升单人次 / 原单核销人次 soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d SELECT a.standard_name ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(b.verify_date_id IS NOT NULL,a.verify_date_id,NULL)) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.verify_date_id)升单率
FROM (
SELECT standard_name
,verify_date_id
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(current_date(),1)
and is_valid = 1
AND standard_name REGEXP '相控微针'
AND ord_up_type_name = '原单'
) a
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT
standard_name
,verify_date_id
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(current_date(),1)
AND ord_up_type_name = '升单'
AND is_valid = 1
) b
ON a.verify_date_id = b.verify_date_id
GROUP BY a.standard_name
;

D131 BBL HERO加购率 统计周期内，品项的升单核销人次/总核销人次 升单核销人次 / 总核销人次 soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d SELECT
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN standard_name regexp "BBL HERO" and is_up =1 then verify_date_id end)/
COUNT(DISTINCT verify_date_id) as 加购率
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),1)
AND is_valid = 1
;

D132 BBL HERO渗透率 90日内，核销过BBL HERO的用户数/总核销用户数量 品项核销用户数 / 总核销用户数 soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d SELECT
ROUND(
COUNT(DISTINCT case when product_name regexp "BBL HERO" then customer_id end) * 1.0 /
NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id), 0), 4 ) as 渗透率
FROM soyoung_dw.dm_opt_qy_user_execution_record_all_d
WHERE dp = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1)
AND executed_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1), 89) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) -- 截至昨天的滚动90天
AND is_valid = 1;
